title: Jitelcraft
description: A small technical/industrial mod for Forge 1.20.1 in a very early stage of development, that adds several useful and useless, in most cases unrelated to each other, materials, items and blocks.
body:
A small non-MCreator technical/industrial mod for Forge 1.20.1 in a very early stage of development, that adds several useful and useless, in most cases unrelated to each other, materials, items and blocks, which I added because I would like to see them in (modded) Minecraft. Mod supports English and Russian languages.

**This mod is not abandoned and development will continue after release of next popular modding version (I hope it will be 26.1).** 1.20.1 is already outdated and lacks some technical features that I want to use, such as emissive textures added in 1.21.2.

Author - _ViI14G3R_ (formerly _Villager12345_).

"Jitel" or "Zhitel" means "Villager" in Russian, and doesn't really make any sense because the mod has nothing to do with villagers (for now).

_Please consider that I am very beginner at programming, so the mod may be unstable, contain bugs and unoptimized code. Most of its code is copied from vanilla, from Mcreator or from tutorials on Youtube._

For versions from 1.16.5 to 1.19.2, the mod was developed in MCreator, but for version 1.20.1, MCreator is no longer used due to annoying flaws and limitations. _These older versions also contained a lot of cringe and strange unfinished useless stuff, so I really don't recommend using them._

Additional information:

- The mod is only available for Forge modloader and most likely will move to Neoforge 26.1. Versions for Fabric and Quilt are not planned.
- Mod supports forge tags (forge:ingots, forge:gems, etc) and EMC from ProjectE.
- It is recommended to play with these mods (because these are good QoL mods): [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [Cucumber](https://modrinth.com/mod/cucumber) or [Better Tips](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-tips-nbt-tag), [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade), [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph), [JAOPCA](https://modrinth.com/mod/jaopca), [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements), [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue), [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured), [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes), [Not Enough Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/nerb), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Overflowing Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars), [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked), [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds), [Equipment Compare](https://modrinth.com/mod/equipment-compare), [Tax Free Levels](https://modrinth.com/mod/tax-free-levels), [Apothic Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes).
- You can find all changelogs [here](https://github.com/Villager1234/jitelcraftdelta/blob/master/CHANGELOGS.md).
- Go to [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jitelcraft) if you need versions before 0.3.0.0 (including versions for 1.16.5 - 1.19.2) because I am too lazy to reupload them here and I don't see the point in that, because they're outdated.
- Version number: **Jitelcraft_⟨1⟩.⟨2⟩.⟨3⟩.b⟨4⟩_⟨5⟩.jar**, where:
  - ⟨1⟩ - Always 0, reserved for the full release and other very major updates
  - ⟨2⟩ - Major updates
  - ⟨3⟩ - Minor and bugfix updates
  - ⟨4⟩ - Snapshots (aka betas)
  - ⟨5⟩ - Minecraft version

<hr>

**_Not_ important message:** JC is officially published only on **CurseForge** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jitelcraft, **Modrinth** https://modrinth.com/mod/jitelcraft and on **Minecraft Inside (ru)** https://minecraft-inside.ru/mods/153704-jitelcraft.html. Publishing the mod on all other sites is not agreed with creator of JC. I don`t forbid it, but also not responsible for any false, outdated or wrongly translated information, and also for outdated or modified files located on such sites (I especially condemn websites that just Ctrl+C Ctrl+V my text from here without any changes, as if I wrote it specifically for them).
